title: Face of Horror
description: You never know who's watching you from the shadows...
body:
![Face of Horror Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8420f4cc80806f35e4d369585c09403a854387d_0.webp)


**FACE OF HORROR**, _Mod version 3.0_

Face of Horror is a horror mod that turns ordinary survival gameplay into a tense, unpredictable experience. Instead of adding constant enemies, it watches the player from the background: strange faces appear in dark corners, voices whisper nearby, sudden sounds break the silence, and full moon nights may become something far more dangerous.

The main feature is a dynamic jumpscare system. Over time, the mod searches for suitable places around each player, prioritizing corners, walls, shadows, and partially hidden spots. A face may appear where the player least expects it, sometimes waiting silently until it is seen. When triggered, the player can be briefly paralyzed, the camera may lock, and custom horror sounds play to make the encounter feel sudden and invasive. This mod creates an atmosphere of constant tension by intermittently triggering terrifying face entities that appear in dark or secluded areas, instantly startling the player.

Face of Horror also includes ambient horror audio. Distant whispers, giggles and voices, and other unsettling sounds can play around the player at random intervals, creating tension even when nothing is visible.

**JUMPSCARES TYPES**
<details>
  
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Simple Jumpscare

![Simple Jumpscare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4463431180d29edcd49c135250b0239e18be62a.gif)

Peeping Jumpscare

![Peeping Jumpscare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6858a71f073556bfa1d7d1e024e94cfa7f2328bf.gif)

Screamer Jumpscare

![Screamer Jumpscare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0f4742bc6ccd1aae312b3bac7723404a51b90ac.gif)

</details>

**CUSTOMIZATION**

Face of Horror add a system where Players can add their own .png face textures and .ogg sounds. The in-game client config lets players enable or disable individual custom files, as well as toggle packaged default sounds. Newly discovered custom assets are enabled by default, and F3 + T reloads them while the game is running. The mod creates a folder in the Minecraft game directory:

![Folders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9325f5859c56ec1c6d646a823fd5fc798a29cf02.png)

**CONFIGS**

**Server** settings control jumpscare timing, full moon behavior, paralysis duration, ambient sound playback, and whether the Harvest Moon event is allowed.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Server configs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/830899c64fa79e072ab9f31226f70d7ea4fe7800.png)

</details>

**Client** settings control selected textures and sounds, making the mod flexible for singleplayer worlds, multiplayer servers, modpacks, or personalized horror setups.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Client Configs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6345ae41bfd5cc6f203619e9527596997aea5b58.png)

</details>

**SPIRIT OF THE HARVEST MOON**

For players who want deeper events, the mod includes the optional Spirit of the Harvest Moon encounter, based on the iconic monster from _“Courage the Cowardly Dog”_. When enabled, full moon nights can trigger a special entity that descends before a player and demands an offering. If the correct offering is given, the player survives the encounter. If not, the spirit may begin hunting, spawning faces and applying dangerous effects until the night ends.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![SOTHM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/555295a6ab946c6187295af2205583de911321d9.png)

</details>
Face of Horror is designed for players who want atmospheric, unpredictable horror without completely replacing Minecraft’s normal survival loop. It works best in dark caves, abandoned builds, night exploration, and survival worlds where the player is never fully sure if they are alone.

Credits:

 [Guim Tio Zarraluki](https://www.instagram.com/guimtio/?hl=es)

 [Scout The Entity](https://www.instagram.com/scout.the.entity/?locale=zh_CN&hl=tl#)

 [darkmindarts](https://www.instagram.com/darkmindarts/)

 [Liminal Land](https://www.visitliminalland.net/)


Main Features


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
• Randomized jumpscares that target each player individually.

• Face entities that appear in corners, walls, shadows, and hidden places.

• A paralysis effect that can stop movement and lock the player’s camera.

• Ambient horror sounds that play around the player.

• Multiple built-in jumpscare, stinger, whisper, giggle, ambience, and death sounds.

• Custom face textures using external .png files.

• Custom sound support using external .ogg files.

• Configurable client and server settings.

• Optional full moon “Spirit of the Harvest Moon” event.

• Admin/debug commands for testing jumpscares and opening config screens.

• EE
</details>
